caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black gaming headset with a microphone is positioned against a plain, light-colored wall. In the first frame, he looks upward and slightly to the side with a neutral expression. As the scene progresses, he speaks and begins to gesture with his hands to emphasize his points. In the second frame, he is seen speaking while extending his right arm forward. By the third frame, he brings his right hand closer to his face, pointing his index finger upward. In the final frame, he raises both hands, palms open and facing each other, while continuing to speak. The text "Ashish Raichur" is visible in the bottom left corner of each frame. The lighting remains consistent throughout the sequence, and the man remains centered in the shot.
